phases.name: Critical — Blocks Everything
phases.goal: Fix broken pages and SEO fundamentals that prevent the site from functioning.

tasks.title: Fix sitemap.xml — returns 404 on production
acceptanceCriteria: GET /sitemap.xml returns 200 with valid XML
Sitemap contains all public page URLs
Sitemap splits into index when >5000 URLs
UJ-070: Google Crawls Sitemap passes

tasks.title: Fix /about page — returns 500 error
acceptanceCriteria: GET /about returns 200
Page renders with content
UJ-019: Navigation works

tasks.title: Fix /sell page — returns 500 error
acceptanceCriteria: GET /sell returns 200
Page renders with content and CTA

tasks.title: Allow AI crawlers in robots.txt
acceptanceCriteria: robots.txt allows GPTBot, OAI-SearchBot, PerplexityBot, ClaudeBot, Google-Extended, Applebot-Extended
UJ-073: AI Crawler Can Access Content passes

tasks.title: Verify all env vars are set in Vercel and document which are missing
acceptanceCriteria: Checklist produced of all required env vars with set/missing status
All critical env vars documented in .env.example
NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL set to production domain

phases.name: Competitive Baseline — Must-Have for Launch
phases.goal: Features required to match Zillow/Redfin baseline and pass all critical user journeys.

tasks.title: Draw-on-map polygon search
acceptanceCriteria: User can click a Draw button on the map
User draws a polygon by clicking points
Listings filter to only those within the polygon
Clear button removes polygon and restores all results
Works on mobile with touch
UJ-006: Draw Polygon on Map passes

tasks.title: Walk Score / Transit Score / Bike Score integration
acceptanceCriteria: Listing detail page shows Walk Score, Transit Score, Bike Score
Data sourced from WalkScore API or similar
Scores are accurate for the property address
Graceful fallback when API unavailable

tasks.title: School information with ratings
acceptanceCriteria: Listing detail page shows nearby schools
Each school shows name, grade levels, distance, rating
Data sourced from GreatSchools API or Spark data
Grouped by Elementary, Middle, High

tasks.title: Filter by monthly payment
acceptanceCriteria: Monthly payment filter option alongside price filter
Calculates from price + estimated rate + estimated taxes + estimated insurance
Results filter by estimated monthly payment
User can set max monthly payment

tasks.title: Integrate AI chat with property search
acceptanceCriteria: Chat widget can understand property search queries
User asks 'Find 3 bedroom homes under 500K in Bend' → gets relevant results
Chat can compare listings
Chat can answer market questions with real data
Chat captures lead info and sends to FUB

tasks.title: Build missing reporting components (StatCard, FreshnessBadge, MarketHealthGauge)
acceptanceCriteria: StatCard shows value + YoY change arrow + label
FreshnessBadge shows 'Updated X minutes/hours ago'
MarketHealthGauge shows 0-100 score with label (Very Hot/Hot/Warm/Cool/Cold)
All components use shadcn/ui and semantic tokens
Components render on market report pages

tasks.title: Build PageCTA component
acceptanceCriteria: Contextual mid-page CTA component
Renders on city, community, listing pages
CTA text is page-specific (not generic 'Learn More')
Form captures email/phone for lead gen
Lead sent to FUB

tasks.title: Programmatic filter pages configuration
acceptanceCriteria: Config defines ~17 filter types (price ranges, property types, bed counts, features)
Each filter type generates a unique slug (e.g., /search/bend/under-300k)
Pages render with correct filters applied
Each page has unique meta title/description
120-170 new indexable pages created
Pages included in sitemap

tasks.title: Author/expertise signals on all content pages
acceptanceCriteria: Blog/guide pages show author name, photo, credentials
Market reports show brokerage credentials and license numbers
Author schema (Person) in JSON-LD
E-E-A-T signals present for YMYL compliance

tasks.title: Verify and fix OG images on all page types
acceptanceCriteria: Every public page type has og:image tag
og:image URL returns 200 and valid image
Twitter card validator shows preview for all page types
UJ-071: Every Public Page Has Meta Tags passes

phases.name: Competitive Parity
phases.goal: Features needed to match what Zillow/Redfin users expect.

tasks.title: Tax history on listing detail
acceptanceCriteria: Listing detail shows multi-year tax assessment data
Data sourced from Spark or public records
Table format with year, assessed value, tax amount

tasks.title: Climate and flood risk data
acceptanceCriteria: Listing detail shows flood zone designation
Fire risk, wind risk, heat risk indicators
Data from FEMA flood maps or environmental risk API
Graceful fallback when data unavailable

tasks.title: Print-friendly listing view
acceptanceCriteria: @media print styles hide nav, footer, ads, interactive elements
Listing prints on 1-2 pages with photos, key facts, description
Print button available on listing detail page

tasks.title: Speed-to-lead auto-response
acceptanceCriteria: Within 5 minutes of inquiry submission, auto-reply email sent
Email acknowledges the specific listing they asked about
Email introduces the assigned agent
Uses Resend for delivery

tasks.title: Lead scoring based on behavior
acceptanceCriteria: Score computed from: page views, listings viewed, saves, return visits, time on site
Score sent to FUB as custom field
High-score leads flagged for immediate follow-up
Scoring logic documented

tasks.title: Shared listing collections
acceptanceCriteria: User can create a named collection of listings
Collection has a shareable URL
Recipients can view collection without signing in
Collections show in user's account

tasks.title: Notes on saved homes
acceptanceCriteria: User can add/edit personal notes on each saved listing
Notes persist across sessions
Notes visible in saved homes list and listing detail

tasks.title: Recent searches history
acceptanceCriteria: Search bar shows recent searches on focus
Recent searches stored in localStorage or user account
Clicking a recent search restores filters and navigates

tasks.title: Full-screen mobile photo gallery with swipe
acceptanceCriteria: Full-screen lightbox on mobile
Swipe left/right to navigate
Pinch to zoom
Photo count indicator
Close with swipe down or X button
UJ-008: Browse Photo Gallery passes

phases.name: Differentiators — Leapfrog Incumbents
phases.goal: AI-native features and deep local intelligence that Zillow/Redfin can't match.

tasks.title: AI property comparison tool
acceptanceCriteria: User selects 2-3 listings to compare
AI generates natural language comparison highlighting pros/cons of each
Side-by-side data table with key metrics
Recommendation based on user's stated preferences

tasks.title: Personalized homepage for returning users
acceptanceCriteria: Signed-in users see personalized sections based on browsing history
Show 'New in [your browsed areas]' listings
Show 'Price changes on homes you viewed'
Show 'Similar to homes you saved'
Anonymous users see generic homepage

tasks.title: AI-generated neighborhood guides (LLM-optimized content)
acceptanceCriteria: Deep, data-grounded content for each community
Structured with H2/H3 hierarchy for LLM extraction
FAQ sections with FAQPage schema
Unique per community (not templates)
Includes real statistics from market data
Author byline with broker credentials

tasks.title: Community livability scores
acceptanceCriteria: Custom 0-100 score per community
Components: outdoor access, walkability, schools, amenities, market health
Score methodology documented and transparent
Rendered on community pages and in search results

tasks.title: Investment analysis on applicable listings
acceptanceCriteria: Show estimated rental income (vacation or long-term)
Cap rate calculation
5-year appreciation forecast based on historical trends
Only shown for applicable properties (not primary residences in HOA-restricted areas)

tasks.title: Predictive market insights
acceptanceCriteria: Market reports show trend direction and velocity
AI-generated forward-looking commentary
'This area prices trending up X% YoY, faster than regional average'
Based on real historical data, not speculation

tasks.title: SMS instant alerts for saved searches
acceptanceCriteria: Users can opt into SMS alerts for saved searches
SMS sent when high-priority match found
Uses Twilio or similar SMS API
Opt-out/unsubscribe mechanism

backlog.title: Expand E2E tests to cover all 46 user journeys
acceptanceCriteria: Every UJ-XXX journey has a corresponding Playwright test
All critical journeys pass against production

backlog.title: Expand unit test coverage from 3% to 30%+
acceptanceCriteria: Critical server actions have tests
Coverage report shows 30%+

backlog.title: Complete structured data coverage (Product, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList, LocalBusiness)
acceptanceCriteria: Product+Offer schema on listing pages
FAQPage on content pages
BreadcrumbList on all pages
LocalBusiness+RealEstateAgent on team pages
Schema validates at schema.org validator

backlog.title: Content hub deepening — topic clusters for each city
acceptanceCriteria: Each city has cluster: main page → neighborhoods → market report → guides → filter pages
Internal linking connects all cluster pages
Each cluster page links to parent and siblings

backlog.title: Performance optimization — ensure Core Web Vitals pass on all pages
acceptanceCriteria: LCP < 2.5s on all page types
CLS < 0.1 on all page types
FID < 100ms
Lighthouse Performance > 80 on all pages
UJ-074 passes
